title: elymus mutabilis
intro: Elymus mutabilis, also known as the changeable wheat grass or silver hair grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Elymus mutabilis include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Elymus mutabilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
